chapters.title: Hello, PHP! 🌐
chapters.description: Get started with PHP: what it is, how to run it, and your first script.

chapters.title: Variables & Data Types 📦
chapters.description: Store and manipulate data using variables and understand PHP's data types.

chapters.title: Operators & Expressions 🧮
chapters.description: Perform calculations, compare values, and combine expressions with operators.

chapters.title: Making Decisions: Conditionals ⚖️
chapters.description: Control the flow of your program with if, else, switch, and match.

chapters.title: Looping the Loop 🔁
chapters.description: Repeat tasks efficiently using while, for, and foreach loops.

chapters.title: Functions: Reusable Code 🛠️
chapters.description: Write reusable blocks of code with functions, parameters, and return values.

chapters.title: Arrays: Lists of Data 📋
chapters.description: Work with indexed and associative arrays, and explore powerful array functions.

chapters.title: Strings & Patterns 📝
chapters.description: Manipulate text with string functions and use regular expressions for pattern matching.

chapters.title: Forms & Superglobals 📬
chapters.description: Handle user input from HTML forms using $_GET, $_POST, and validate data.

chapters.title: File Handling 📂
chapters.description: Read from and write to files, work with directories, and handle file uploads.

chapters.title: Sessions & Cookies 🍪
chapters.description: Maintain user state across pages with sessions and cookies.

chapters.title: Object-Oriented PHP 🧬
chapters.description: Dive into classes, objects, inheritance, and modern OOP principles.

chapters.title: Error Handling & Exceptions ⚠️
chapters.description: Gracefully handle errors and exceptions to build robust applications.

chapters.title: Database with PDO 🗄️
chapters.description: Connect to MySQL, execute queries securely using PDO and prepared statements.

chapters.title: Advanced Topics & Security 🚀
chapters.description: Work with JSON, dates, cURL, and learn essential security practices.
